title: Roadmap GitHub labels documentation

source.subject: chore(docs): add roadmap labels documentation and update Dockerfiles for Bun versioning

body:
Documents GitHub **roadmap/** labels used by beskid_tracker kanban columns and updates Dockerfiles for consistent Bun versioning.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`be6ca5e`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/be6ca5e)
- **Subject:** chore(docs): add roadmap labels documentation and update Dockerfiles for Bun versioning
- **Completed:** 2026-05-25

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.3 (Macros, concurrency, and stabilization)
- **Workstream:** `dev-experience`

## Relation
Lands in the v0.3 cutoff window (`f57377a`→`aaddd32`) under workstream `dev-experience`.
